message:
feat(fsqlite-func): add window function builtins and expand datetime functions

- datetime.rs: add ~66 lines expanding date/time modifier parsing with
  support for relative date offsets (±N days/months/years), 'start of'
  modifiers (month/year/day), and 'weekday N' modifier logic
- lib.rs: wire up window_builtins module and update function registry
  dispatch for window aggregate functions
- window_builtins.rs (new): implement built-in window functions
  (row_number, rank, dense_rank, ntile, lag, lead, first_value,
  last_value, nth_value) with proper frame-aware accumulation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
